changeSet.author: ADMIN (generated)
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO `tradex-configuration`.t_open_api (id, operation_id, tags, uri_pattern, summary, `security`, parameters, request_body, responses, description, `version`, created_at, updated_at) SELECT id, name, '["NHSV-ADMIN"]', uri_pattern, name, '[{"jwt": []}]', '[{"in":"query","name":"chatRoomId","schema":{"type":"string"},"required":true,"description":"ChatRoom Id"}]', '[]', '{"200":{"chatRoom":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"name":{"type":"number"},"introduction":{"type":"number"},"photo":{"type":"number"},"totalView":{"type":"number"},"contact":{"type":"number"},"createdAt":{"type":"number"},"updatedAt":{"type":"number"},"brokerInfo":{"type":"object","properties":{"brokerId":{"type":"number"},"email":{"type":"string"},"fullName":{"type":"string"},"isDynamic":{"type":"boolean"}}},"socialLinks":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"type":{"type":"number"},"link":{"type":"string"}}}}}}}},"description":"OK"},"401":{"description":"Your access token is invalid or expired"}}', 'get Chat Room', '/api/v1', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() FROM `tradex-configuration`.t_scope WHERE name = 'NHSV-VIEW-CHAT-ROOM';

INSERT INTO `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_scope_group_map (scope_id, scope_group_id) SELECT ts.id, tsg.id FROM `tradex-configuration`.t_scope ts, `tradex-configuration`.t_scope_group tsg WHERE ts.name = 'NHSV-VIEW-CHAT-ROOM' AND tsg.scope_group_name = 'PUBLIC';
